name: Joan Mateo Duarte Politi
positioning: I build products where AI, systems, and interface design meet.
story: I'm from Argentina. I've been obsessed with solving problems since I was a kid — math olympiads, not because anyone pushed me, but because I loved the challenge. The solution is never the hard part. The approach is everything.

At 21 I dropped out of university to start a Bitcoin mining company. It worked. We scaled fast, and that itch to build never went away. So I taught myself to code — because I refused to keep delegating the most important part of building a company.

Now I do the whole thing: product, architecture, design, shipping. Flare has 16 database tables with row-level security, 13 Edge Functions, 6 AI agents, and 12 database triggers. I built all of it. I pick problems I believe in, go deep, and ship.

chess.text: 16 pieces, 64 squares, more possible positions than grains of sand on Earth. Pattern recognition, calculated risk, knowing when to trade material for position — it maps directly to how I build products.

reading.text: I read a lot — strategy, psychology, history, fiction. Anything that changes how I think about the world. A few favorites:
